scene: The springs run low. Your groves and your tenant plots cannot both be watered.

choices.label: Water the groves
choices.resultText: The olives survive. The tenants remember.

choices.label: Water the tenant plots
choices.resultText: Thin harvest, thick loyalty.

scene: Black spots on the olive leaves. A Gaulish farmhand claims his people know a remedy.

choices.label: Try the Gaulish remedy
choices.resultText: Ash and ditch-water, and somehow the trees recover.

choices.label: Stick to Greek methods
choices.resultText: Hesiod's advice costs you a row of trees, with dignity.

scene: A neighbor's boundary stone has migrated three paces into your field overnight.

choices.label: Take it to the magistrates
choices.resultText: Witnesses, oaths, and the stone walks home.

choices.label: Move it back four paces
choices.resultText: An escalation measured in paces.

scene: A bumper harvest. Your presses run day and night.

choices.label: Sell at market peak
choices.resultText: Amphorae out, silver in.

choices.label: Tithe a share to the Temple of Artemis
choices.resultText: First fruits to the goddess; the rest still sells well.

scene: Harvest hands are scarce. A Ligurian village offers seasonal workers at fair rates.

choices.label: Hire them
choices.resultText: The harvest comes in on time, in two languages.

choices.label: Pay extra for citizen labor
choices.resultText: Costlier, slower, and politically pristine.

scene: The city offers a contract to supply the public granary at a fixed, modest price.

choices.label: Accept - steady and civic
choices.resultText: Your grain becomes the city's bread.

choices.label: Refuse - the open market pays better
choices.resultText: Better margins, colder nods at the council.

scene: Surveyors find your new parcel includes an old grove the Ligurians hold sacred.

choices.label: Fence and preserve it
choices.resultText: The grove stands. Gaulish goodwill takes root.

choices.label: Clear it for planting
choices.resultText: Good soil under old roots. Someone curses your name in a language you don't speak.

scene: A locust cloud darkens the eastern chora and drifts toward your land.

choices.label: Light smoke fires, rally every hand
choices.resultText: Half saved. In a locust year, half is a triumph.

choices.label: Sacrifice to Demeter and wait
choices.resultText: The cloud turns at the river. Coincidence is a weak word.

scene: A hillside parcel ideal for vines comes up for sale - and the wine trade with Gaul is booming.

choices.label: Buy and plant vines
choices.resultText: In three years, every Gaulish chief will drink your vintage.

choices.label: Pass - olives are certainty
choices.resultText: A rival buys it. You will know in three years who was right.

scene: Two tenant families feud over a shared threshing floor; work has stopped.

choices.label: Arbitrate fairly
choices.resultText: A schedule, an oath, and threshing resumes.

choices.label: Evict the louder family
choices.resultText: Quiet fields. Quieter dinner invitations.
